en: How’s the weather today?

ab: parullitek na wari garem. treketrekel dra bias dra enay.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?

ab: parubias na wari garem. treketrekel dra enay.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: panana na kadaw. adri kaabalu penadang kana patatalaan dra kadaw.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?
There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: adri kakadaw an daman. kakutrem aw kapakakireb a bali.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.
How was the weather that day?

ab: parullitek kandri na wari. pikiruwan dra patratreell an uwapatraran yu.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.
How’s the weather on the weekend?
It will be sunny on the weekend.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: kainanaba na wari an adru. adri kaaudall.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: aiwa, kaaudall na wari an adru.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?

ab: madranga lla na udall. mupatraran lla na kadaw.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?

ab: maudall lla. adri ku kemasu dra kalipang.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: adri maudall garem. an paelipas dra karealliyan i, kaaudall. kasu lla dra kalipang an uwapatraran yu.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.
Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: aiwa, kallallitek na wari an mariami. pikiruwan lla dra sadeku.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: kababias na wari kandri na kadenunan?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: aiwa, kababias na wari kandri na kadenunan. treketrekel lla dra enay.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ab: aiwa, sagar ku an kaseberan. sadeku na wari.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?

ab: adri ku sagar an kapuluan. ullaya a bariwan an kapuluan dar.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天會有颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
